description_for_human: Creative Intelligence Platform — build worlds, generate characters, create quests with 42 AI tools.
description_for_model: Arcanea is a creative intelligence platform with 42 MCP (Model Context Protocol) tools for world-building. It can generate characters, locations, creatures, quests, artifacts, magic systems, and analyze faction dynamics. All creations auto-link into coherent narratives. The platform includes 190K+ words of original mythology, 10-gate progression system, 7 Academy Houses, and 49 npm packages. Use the MCP bridge at /api/worlds/mcp-bridge to call tools via REST.
